description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has four jobs: build-windows, build-ubuntu, build-alpine, and build-macos. Each job runs on a different environment (windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macos-latest respectively), checks out the repository, and performs a series of steps to build and package the project, including restoring NuGet packages, building with MSBuild or CMake, and uploading artifacts.
